# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

config:
  jmx:
    enabled: true
    rmi.port: 9999
  listeners:
    - name: PLAINTEXT
      port: 9092
      config:
        listener.name: plain-text
        listener.security.protocol.map:
          PLAINTEXT: plaintext
        listener.authenticator.class.name: io.confluent.kafka.services.plaintext.PlainTextAuthenticator
        listener.sasl.enabled.mechs:
        listener.sasl.plain.handler.name: io.confluent.kafka.services.plaintext.PlainTextSASLHandler
        ssl.keystore.location: /path/to/keystore.jks
        ssl.truststore.location: /path/to/truststore.jks
        ssl.key.password: <key password>
  metrics:
    exposure:
      internal.sensors.memory.cache.size:
      internal.sensors.jvm.heap_memory_usage.size: 'read-only'
    reporters:
      - type: JmxReporter
        host.name: 0.0.0.0
        port: 9999
